name: codex-agent
description: Context-aware planning, implementation, testing, research, and review workflows for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Plan changes, discover and curate repository context, delegate focused work, implement incrementally, generate tests, research external APIs, and review results with evidence.
defaultPrompt: Plan and implement this feature with repository context.
Review this change for correctness and regressions.
Find the relevant project conventions before coding.
Analyze this repository and preview a project-specific Codex setup.
Review this project knowledge and save it only after showing me a preview.
